title: 声音实验室
subtitle: 嘴巴是怎么制造不同声音的？
learningGoal: 发现口型与音素的对应关系——为 Boss 关的发声验证做准备
learningGoalEn: Discover mouth-shape-to-phoneme mapping — preparation for voice production in Boss levels

gameObjects.label: 双唇闭合
gameObjects.tooltip: 两片嘴唇合拢，用鼻子出气

gameObjects.label: 舌尖抵齿
gameObjects.tooltip: 舌尖靠近上齿背，气流从缝隙挤出

hints.text: 点击三种不同的口型，听听每种口型能产生什么声音。你觉得这和真实的嘴巴有关系吗？
hints.textEn: Click the three mouth shapes to hear what each produces. How does this relate to a real mouth?

hints.text: 试试看：双唇闭合发出嗡嗡声(/m/)，舌尖抵齿发出嘶嘶声(/s/)，张大嘴巴发出开阔的声音(/a/)。三种都试一遍吧！
hints.textEn: Closed lips = humming (/m/), tongue-to-teeth = hissing (/s/), open wide = open sound (/a/). Try all three!

failureModes.descriptionEn: Has not clicked all mouth shapes

introText: 你发现声音碎片来自不同的口型！实验室里有一台口腔模拟器——点击不同的口型来看看它们如何产生不同的声音。三种都试一遍，记录下结果。
introTextEn: Sound fragments come from different mouth shapes! The lab has a mouth simulator — click different mouth shapes to see how they produce different sounds. Try all three and record the results.
victoryText: 实验完成！嘴唇、舌头和口腔空间的不同组合产生了不同的声音。这就是声音的物理原理——你学会了用口腔作为'乐器'来制造声音。
victoryTextEn: Experiment complete! Different combinations of lips, tongue, and mouth space produce different sounds. This is the physics of sound production.
